instructions.none: Move your hand naturally; do not form a command gesture
instructions.pinch_right: Touch thumb and middle fingertip; keep index extended
instructions.open_palm: Show an open palm with fingers extended
instructions.fist: Make a fist with the thumb tucked
instructions.fist_thumb_up: Make a fist and extend the thumb upward
instructions.v_sign: Make a wide V with index and middle fingers
instructions.two_finger_scroll: Extend index and middle fingers close together
